item.title: I support the liberation of all people, and it has been shown time and time again that productive liberatory narratives get hija...
item.description:
I support the liberation of all people, and it has been shown time and time again that productive liberatory narratives get hijacked and highlighted to support intervention and sanction that only serves the American empire



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: It is not embarrassing it is telling and it is telling you that this movement, while perhaps having some legitimate causes origi...
item.description:
It is not embarrassing it is telling and it is telling you that this movement, while perhaps having some legitimate causes originally, has been instrumentalised and is primarily an instrument of western imperialism#greenscreenvideo



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: It’s almost like they provided a socialisation of their resources that benefits be international bourgeoisie and therefore they ...
item.description:
It’s almost like they provided a socialisation of their resources that benefits be international bourgeoisie and therefore they don’t need to be directly paid to say things, because they #greenscreenvideo

item.title: Monarchists are no better and extraordinarily harmful because they want to install an authoritarian dictator that just benefits ...
item.description:
Monarchists are no better and extraordinarily harmful because they want to install an authoritarian dictator that just benefits #greenscreenvideo



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: What they mean is white
item.description:
What they mean is white. Like in the abstract what they mean is that they are a part of white supremacy, because there is absolutely no way to look at Israel and Turkey and Cyprus and Lebanon and say that one is more democratic than the other#greenscreenvideo



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)
